description: Late accounts. The name Avraham Serano (סראנו) is listed on the verso but many other names are badly damaged and less legible. An Avraham Serano (שיראנו) is also mentioned in Bodl. MS Heb. c 27/87 (1740 CE PGPID 19319) but these accounts JRL L 56 may be significantly older based on the paleography– perhaps as early as 16th-century. The surname Griyanī is also visible on the verso. MCD.
